Abstract.
Abstract
Abstract.
AbstractAuxiliaryContractBuiltInRuleApp

AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
Abstract base class for all default implementations of the sub-interfaces of AuxiliaryContract.
AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Combinator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
This class is used to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
This class contains a builder method for AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpls (AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator.create()).
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule
Rule for the application of AuxiliaryContracts.
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiation
This encapsulates all information from the rule application that is needed to apply the rule.
AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiator
A builder for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiations.
AbstractBackwardSlicer
Provides a basic implementation of backward slicing algorithms.
AbstractBetaFeature
This abstract class contains some auxiliary methods for the selection of beta rules that are supposed to be applied.

Informations about a term as cached within "betaCandidates"

Provides the basic functionality for StopConditions which stops the auto mode when the call stack size of the starting set node has a special difference to the call stack size of the current set node, e.g.

AbstractConditionalBreakpoint
Adds the funtionality to breakpoints to evaluate conditions.

AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
Implementations of this class are used find a counter example for a given Sequent using the SMT solver SolverTypes.Z3_CE_SOLVER.

AbstractDomainElemChoice
Model class for the manual choice of an abstract domain element by the user.
AbstractDomainElement
An element of an abstract domain.
AbstractDomainLattice
An abstract domain is a countable lattice with a partial order relation and a join operator.
AbstractElement
Default implementation of ISymbolicElement.
AbstractEnvInput
A simple EnvInput which includes default rules and a Java path.

AbstractExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>

AbstractFileRepo

AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
Adds the hit count functionality to an AbstractBreakpoint.
AbstractIndex
 
AbstractInfFlowPO
Abstract to customize AbstractPO and AbstractOperationPO.
AbstractIntegerLiteral
This class is a superclass for integer literals (Int, Long, Char).
AbstractionPredicate
Interface for predicates used for predicate abstraction.
AbstractionPredicatesChoiceDialog
A Swing reimplementation of the (much nicer) JavaFX abstraction predicates choice dialog -- since JavaFX got removed from Oracle Java.
AbstractLoopContractBuiltInRuleApp
Application of AbstractLoopContractRule.
AbstractLoopContractRule
Rule for the application of LoopContracts.
AbstractLoopContractRule.Instantiator
A builder for AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.Instantiations.
AbstractLoopInvariantRule
An abstract super class for loop invariant rules.
AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AdditionalHeapTerms
A container with data for the additional terms with assertions about the heap; that is, the anonymizing update, the wellformed term, the frame condition and the reachable state formula.
AbstractLoopInvariantRule.AnonUpdateData
A container containing data for the anonymizing update, that is the actual update and the anonymized heap.
AbstractLoopInvariantRule.Instantiation
A container for an instantiation of this LoopScopeInvariantRule application; contains the update, the program with post condition, the While loop the LoopScopeInvariantRule should be applied to, the LoopSpecification, the self Term.
AbstractLoopInvariantRule.LoopInvariantInformation
A container object containing the information required for the concrete loop invariant rules to create the sequents for the new goals.
AbstractMediatorUserInterfaceControl
Provides a basic implementation of UserInterfaceControl for user interfaces in which a KeYMediator is available.
AbstractMonomialSmallerThanFeature
 
AbstractNonDuplicateAppFeature
 
AbstractOperationPO
This abstract implementation of ProofOblInput extends the functionality of AbstractPO to execute some code within a try catch block.
AbstractOperator
Abstract operator class offering some common functionality.
AbstractOrInterfaceType
This variable condition checks if a given type denotes an abstract class or interface type.
AbstractPO
An abstract proof obligation implementing common functionality.
AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement
A base class for abstract domain elements in a predicate abstraction lattice.
AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice
A super class for predicates abstraction lattices.
AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice.AbstractPredicateLatticeIterator
An abstract iterator which basically only sets up the bit sets used for building up complex iterators.
AbstractProblemLoader
This class provides the basic functionality to load something in KeY.

AbstractProgramElement
 
AbstractProofControl
Provides a basic implementation of ProofControl.

AbstractProofMacro
Takes care of providing the whole ProofMacro interface by only making it necessary to implement to most general application methods for a given list of goals and translating the less general versions (firstly for a given node and secondly having neither any goals nor a node).
AbstractProofReplayer
Abstract proof replayer/constructor.
AbstractProperties
 
AbstractPropertiesSettings
A base class for own settings based on properties.
AbstractPropertiesSettings.PropertyEntry<T>
 
AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro
The Class AbstractPropositionalExpansionMacro applies purely propositional rules.
AbstractProverCore

AbstractRunnableWithResult<T>

This abstract class provides a stub for translation of KeY-Formulas to other standards.

remember all function declarations

The SolverSocket class describes the communication between the KeY and the SMT solver process.

AbstractSortedOperator
Abstract sorted operator class offering some common functionality.

AbstractStrategyPropertyDefinition
Provides the basic function definition of user interface controls to edit a single key-value-pair in StrategyProperties.
AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer

AbstractTacletBuilderCommand
Simple default implementation for TacletBuilderCommand.
AbstractTermTransformer

AbstractTestGenerator

AbstractUpdateExtractor

Provides the basic functionality for classes like ExecutionNodeWriter and SymbolicLayoutWriter which encodes an object structure as XML.

The abstract class AlternativeMacro can be used to create compound macros which apply the first applicable macro (similar to a shortcut disjunction) and then it returns.

AmbiguousImportException

Deprecated.
Does not (yet) check ambiguity or conflicts.
AppIntermediate
Represents an intermediate rule / taclet application.
ApplicationCheck
Determines conflicts relevant for a delayed cut application.
ApplicationCheck.NoNewSymbolsCheck
Implementation of an ApplicationCheck which examines if there are new symbols introduced below the cut node.
AppliedRuleAppsNameCache
Establishes a cache for the applied rule apps to query them by name.
AppliedRuleStopCondition
Implementation of StopCondition which stops the strategy after a reached limit of rules or after a timeout in ms.
ApplyStrategy
Applies rules in an automated fashion.
ApplyStrategyInfo
The final result of the strategy application is stored in this container and returned to the instance that started the strategies.
ApplyTacletDialog
common superclass of TacletIfSelectionDialog and TacletMatchCompletionDialog

AutoMacro

AutomatedRuleFeature
This feature checks if a rule may be applied automatically.
AutomaticProver
A very simple type of prover, but it is sufficient for the automatic lemmata handling: Normally there is a mechanism for choosing the next goal in a cyclic way if for the currently chosen goal no rules are left that could be applied.

AuxiliaryContract
Super-interface for BlockContract and LoopContract.
AuxiliaryContract.Terms
 
AuxiliaryContract.Variables
This class contains all new variables that are introduced during a AuxiliaryContract's instantiation.
AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator
 
AuxiliaryContractBuilders
This contains various builders used in building formulae and terms for block and loop contracts.
AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ConditionsAndClausesBuilder
This class is used to build various sub-formulas used in the block/loop contract rules.s
AuxiliaryContractBuilders.GoalsConfigurator
This class contains methods to add the premisses for the block contract rule to the goal.
AuxiliaryContractBuilders.UpdatesBuilder
This class is used to build the various updates that are needed for block/loop contract rules.
AuxiliaryContractBuilders.ValidityProgramConstructor
This class is used to construct block' from block (see Wacker 2012, 3.3).
AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar
This class contains methods to create new variables from the contract's placeholder variables (see AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables()), and register them.
AuxiliaryContractConfigurator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
A window to contain a AuxiliaryContractSelectionPanel.
AuxiliaryContractSelectionPanel<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
This panel used to select which T(s) to use for a AbstractAuxiliaryContractRule.

ChildTermLabelPolicy
A ChildTermLabelPolicy is used by TermLabelManager.instantiateLabels(TermLabelState, Services, PosInOccurrence, Rule, RuleApp, Goal, Object, Term, Term) to decide for each TermLabel on a child or grandchild of the application Term if it should be re-added to the new Term or not.
Choice
A choice is an option in a category.
ChoiceExpr
A ChoiceExpr is a boolean expression that determines whether a taclet or a goal should be activated.
ChoiceFinder
This visitor gathers the choice information in KeyAst.File and provide ChoiceInformation.
ChoiceInformation
A POJO representing the information on choices in ASTs.
ChoicePoint

ChoiceSelector.ChoiceEntry
Represents a choice with all its meta information.

ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor
A Visitor class to collect all (not just the free) variables occurring in a term.
ClassAxiom
An axiom originating from a (JML) specification, belonging to a particular class, and constraining a particular observer symbol.
ClassAxiomAndInvariantProofReferencesAnalyst
Extracts used ClassAxiom and ClassInvariants.
ClassAxiomImpl
Represents an axiom specified in a class.
ClassDeclaration
There are several types of class declarations: package-less outer classes getClassContainer() == null getStatementContainer() == null getName() != null ordinary outer classes getClassContainer() instanceof Package getStatementContainer() == null getName() != null member classes getClassContainer() instanceof ClassDeclaration getStatementContainer() == null getName() != null local class getClassContainer() == null getStatementContainer() != null getName() != null local anonymous class getClassContainer() == null getStatementContainer() instanceof expression.New getName() == null Anonymous local classes have exactly one supertype and no subtypes.
ClassDeclaration
Outer or inner class declaration.
ClassFile
 
ClassFileDeclarationBuilder
Make a ClassDeclaration out of a class file.
ClassFileDeclarationManager
This class provides an infrastructure to read in multiple class files and to manufacture ClassDeclarations out of them.
ClassFileRepository
Retrieval and storage of parsed bytecode files.
ClassInitializeMethodBuilder
Each class is prepared before it is initialised.
ClassInitializer
 
ClassInitializer
Class initializer.

Each class is prepared before it is initialised.

CloseAllByReference

CloseByReference

ClosedBy

ClosedExpressionTermFeature
return zero cost if given term does not contain any free variables.
ClosedGoal
Graph node that represents a closed goal.
CoeffGcdProjection
Given a monomial and a polynomial, this projection computes the gcd of all numerical coefficients.
CollectionUtil
Provides static methods to work with Collections.
ColorSettings
Configurable colors for KeY.
ColorSettingsProvider
 
CommandLine
A small framework to handle command lines.
CommandLineException
Exception used by CommandLine.
CommandLineProgram
This class can be used either as a template or as a base class for building RECODER command line applications.
Comment
Comment element of Java source code.
Comment
A comment, possibly with multiple lines.
CommentKit
 
ComparativeOperator
Comparative operator.
ComparativeOperator
Comparative operator.
CompareCostsFeature
 
CompilationUnit
A node representing a single source file containing TypeDeclarations and an optional PackageSpecification and an optional set of Imports.
CompilationUnit
A node representing a single source file containing TypeDeclarations and an optional PackageSpecificationand an optional set of Imports.
ComplexRuleJustification
 
ComplexRuleJustificationBySpec
 
CompositePTListener
A composite structure for prover task listeners.
CompoundProof
 
CompoundStopCondition
This StopCondition contains other StopCondition as children and stops the auto mode if at least on of its children force it.
ComprehendedSumFeature
A feature that computes the sum of the values of a feature term when a given variable ranges over a sequence of terms
Conditional
The most weird ternary C operator ?:
Conditional
The ternary C-style conditional operator.
ConditionalFeature
A feature that evaluates one of two given features, depending on the result of a RuleFilter
ConditionBuilder
A specilized TacletBuilderCommand for handling \varconds.
Config
this class is used to set some default gui properties
ConfigChangeAdapter
 
ConfigChangeEvent
An event that indicates that the users focused node or proof has changed
ConfigChangeListener
The ConfigChangeListener is notified if the UI settings in class Config change.
Configuration
A container to hold parsed configurations.
Configuration.ConfigurationMeta
POJO for metadata of configuration entries.
Configuration.ConfigurationWriter
Writer for configurations.
Conflict
Problem report indicating that the planned transformation produces a conflict with existing model elements.
ConjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the conjunction of predicates.
ConjunctivePredicateAbstractionLattice
A lattice for all predicates accepting the given sort.
ConsoleGenericRemoverMonitor
 
ConsoleProofObligationSelector
 
ConsoleUserInterfaceControl
Implementation of UserInterfaceControl used by command line interface of KeY.
ConstantCondition
This variable condition checks if an instantiation is a constant formula or term, i.e.
ConstantEvaluator
Constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
ConstantEvaluator.EvaluationResult
Carrier for intermediate evaluation results.
ConstantExpressionEvaluator
 
ConstantStringExpressionEvaluator
 
ConstantTermFeature
 
ConstantValue
Replace a program variable that is a compile-time constant with the value of the initializer
ConstFeature
A feature that returns a constant value
Constraint
Deprecated.
Constraint.Top
Deprecated.
ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor
In KeY 1.x we supported a free variable calculus based on meta variables.
Constructor
A program model element representing constructors.
Constructor
A program model element representing constructors.
ConstructorBasedBuilder
 
ConstructorCall
The constructor call meta construct is used to handle a allocation expression like new Class(...).
ConstructorDeclaration
The getTypeReference method returns null - constructors do not have explicite return types.
ConstructorDeclaration
The getTypeReference method returns null - constructors do not have explicit return types.
ConstructorInfo
 
ConstructorNormalformBuilder
Transforms the constructors of the given class to their normalform.
ConstructorReference
Constructor reference.
ConstructorReference
Constructor reference.
ConstTermFeature
A feature that returns a constant value
ContainsAssignmentCondition
This variable condition can be used to check whether an assignment expression occurs as a subexpression of a schemavariable instantiation,
ContainsExecutableCodeTermFeature
Returns zero iff a term contains a program or (optionally) a query expression
ContainsLabelFeature
 
ContainsLabelNameFeature
 
ContainsQuantifierFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the focus of a rule contains a quantifier
ContainsStatementVisitor
Utilits class used by SymbolicExecutionUtil#containsStatement(MethodFrame, ProgramElement, Services).
ContainsTermFeature
Feature for checking if the term of the first projection contains the term of the second projection.
Context
Common information that is needed almost everywhere during translation.
ContextInstantiationEntry
This class is used to store the information about a matched context of a dl formula.
ContextMenuAdapter
 
ContextMenuKind
 
ContextStatementBlock
In the DL-formulae description of Taclets the program part can have the following form < pi alpha;...; omega > Phi where pi is a prefix consisting of open brackets, try's and so on and omega is the rest of the program.
ContextStatementBlock
Statement block.
ContextStatementBlockInstantiation
this class is created if the scheme given by a context term has matched to a java program.
Continue
Continue.
Continue
Continue.
Contract
A contractual agreement about an ObserverFunction.
Contract.OriginalVariables
Class for storing the original variables without always distinguishing several different cases depending on which variables are present/needed in order to provide a general interface.
ContractAppCollector
Walker for collecting contract applications.
ContractAxiom
 
ContractConfigurator
 
ContractFactory
Contracts should only be created through methods of this class
ContractPO
An obligation for some kind of contract.
ContractProofReferencesAnalyst
Extracts used contracts.
ContractRuleApp
Represents an application of a contract rule.
ContractsAndInvariantsFinder
This visitor finds all contracts and invariant clauses in KeyAst.
ContractSelectionPanel
A panel for selecting contracts.
ConversionException
 
ConvertException
This exception class is mainly thrown by Recoder2KeY and its companions.
CopyAssignment
Copy assignment.
CopyAssignment
Copy assignment.
CopyingProofReplayer
Replayer that copies proof steps from one proof to another.
CopyReferencedProof
Action to copy referenced proof steps to the new proof.
CopyReferenceResolver
 
CopyToClipboardAction
Copy a term that is currently selected (i.e., under the mouse cursor) in the current goal view to the default system clip board.
CountBranchFeature
Feature that returns the number of branches for a given taclet application Size of "assumes" sequents is currently not considered
Counter
Proof-specific counter object: taclet names, var names, node numbers, etc
CounterExampleAction
 
CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator
Performs the SemanticsBlastingMacro in a side proof hidden to the user and shows the result with help of the SolverListener.
CountingBufferedReader
 
CountMaxDPathFeature
Feature that returns the maximum number of literals occurring within a d-path of the find-formula as a formula of the antecedent.
CountPosDPathFeature
Feature that returns the maximum number of positive literals occurring within a d-path of the find-formula as a formula of the antecedent.
CPBranch
One branch of a ChoicePoint.
CreateArrayMethodBuilder
This class creates the <createArray> method for array creation and in particular its helper method <createArrayHelper>.
CreateBeforeLoopUpdate
Initializes the "before loop" update needed for the modifiable clause.
CreateBuilder
If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values.
CreateFrameCond
Creates the frame condition (aka "modifiable clause") for the given loop.
CreateHeapAnonUpdate
Creates the anonymizing update for the heap.
CreateLocalAnonUpdate
Expects a loop body and creates the anonymizing update out_1:=anon_1||...||out_n:=anon_n, where anon_1, ..., anon_n are the written variables in the loop body visible to the outside.
CreateObject
If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values.
CreateObjectBuilder
If an allocation expression new Class(...) occurs, a new object has to be created, in KeY this is quite similar to take it out of a list of objects and setting the implicit flag <created> to true as well as setting all fields of the object to their default values.
CreateWellformedCond
Creates the wellformedness condition for the given anonymizing heap terms if they apply for the current profile and modality type.
CreatingASTVisitor
Walks through a java AST in depth-left-fist-order.
CrossReferenceServiceConfiguration
 
CrossReferenceSourceInfo
Source information service supporting cross reference information.
CurrentGoalView
This sequent view displays the sequent of an open goal and allows selection of formulas as well as the application of rules.
CurrentGoalViewMenu
The menu shown by a CurrentGoalViewListener when the user clicks on a CurrentGoalView, i.e.
CurrentGoalViewMenu.TacletAppComparator
 
CustomTreeWalker
A tree walker that allows to customize the traversal.
CutCommand
The command object CutCommand has as scriptcommand name "cut" As parameters: a formula with the id "#2"
CutCommand.Parameters
 
CutHeapObjectsFeature
This BinaryFeature checks if a cut with an equality for an alias check should be done or not.
CutHeapObjectsTermGenerator
This TermGenerator is used by the SymbolicExecutionStrategy to add early alias checks of used objects as target of store operations on heaps.
CVC4Socket
 
CVC5Socket
Socket for CVC5 (...).
CyclicInheritanceException
Exception indicating a cyclic inheritance.
DataFileLocation
This class implements a data location that describes aJava source code file.
DataLocation
Describes the origin of source or object data, such as files, URLs, or archive entries.
Debug
Debug offers some methods for assertions, debug output and so on.
Debug
Routines to debug.
DebugJmlLexer
This program is a little for debugging KeY Lexer.
DebugKeyLexer
This program is a little for debugging KeY Lexer.
DebugMBean
This interface provides the class Debug with the possibility to be administrated from within management tools such as "jconsole".
Declaration
Declaration.
Declaration
Declaration.
DeclarationBuilder
This visitor evaluates all basic (level 0) declarations.
DeclarationProgramVariableCollector
The DeclarationProgramVariableCollector collects all top level declared program variables relative to the given block to be visited, for example starting with { int j; { int i; } { int h; } for (int k; ...) {} int h; } the collector will return a set containg j, h the h because of the second occurrence of h
DeclarationSpecifier
 
DecreaseFontSizeAction
 
Default
Default.
Default
Default.
DefaultBuilder
Helper class for are visitor that requires a namespaces and services.
DefaultBuiltInRuleApp
this class represents an application of a built in rule application
DefaultByteCodeInfo
 
DefaultClassFileRepository
 
DefaultConstantEvaluator
Easy constant folder to evaluate Java compile-time constants.
DefaultConstructor
Deprecated.
is actually never used
DefaultConstructor
Default constructor of class types.
DefaultContextMenuKind
 
DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo
Implements queries for cross referencing.
DefaultEdge
Directed graph edge for use in DirectedGraph that simply stores the source and target graph nodes.
DefaultEntry<K,V>
 
DefaultErrorHandler
 
DefaultGoalChooser
Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied.
DefaultGoalChooserBuilder
creates the default goal chooser used in KeY
DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
This class implements ImmutableMap<S,T> and provides a persistent map.
DefaultImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>
implementation of a persistent set using the SLListOf implementation with all its implications (means e.g.
DefaultImplicitElementInfo
Handles requests for implicitely defined program model elements.
DefaultNameInfo
 
DefaultProfileResolver
Instances of this class are used to get a default Profile instance.
DefaultProgramModelInfo
 
DefaultProjectFileIO
Imports and exports simple properties files.
DefaultProofControl
The default implementation of ProofControl.
DefaultProofReference<T>
Default implementation of IProofReference.
DefaultReferenceSearchDialogListener
The default controller for the ReferenceSearchDialog.
DefaultServiceConfiguration
 
DefaultSettingsProvider
 
DefaultSMTSettings
The default implementation of SMTSettings.
DefaultSourceFileRepository
 
DefaultSourceInfo
Implements queries for program model elements with concrete syntactical representations.
DefaultSpecificationContainer
Default implementation of SpecificationContainer.
DefaultTacletSetTranslation
 
DefaultTacletTranslator
Translates a rewrite taclet to a formula.
DefaultTaskFinishedInfo
 
DefaultTaskStartedInfo
Default implementation of a TaskStartedInfo.
DefaultTermParser
Deprecated.
Use the facade new KeyIO(services).parseTerm directly
DefaultUserInterfaceControl
The DefaultUserInterfaceControl which allows proving in case that no specific user interface is available.
DefaultVisitor
This abstract Vistor class declares the interface for a common term visitor.
DefinedSymbolsHandler
This handler is meant to translate all function symbols for which key axioms, SMT axioms or defining taclets have been registered.
DelayedCut
This class wraps the information about the delayed cut.
DelayedCutListener
Interface for DelayedCut listeners.
DelayedCutProcessor
This class is responsible for processing the delayed cut.
DelegationBasedAutomatedRuleApplicationManager
An AutomatedRuleApplicationManager based on delegation.
DeleteFormulaAction
Action for the user to visually delete formulas from the sequent (using hide)
DeleteMergePointRuleFeature
Costs for the DeleteMergePointRuleFeature; incredibly cheap if the previous rule application was a MergeRule app, infinitely expensive otherwise.
DependencyAnalyzer
Implementation of both proof analysis algorithms.
DependencyChecker
Checks for illegal cyclic dependencies between proofs.
Algorithm description: create the dependency graph:
for each proof p create a node containing the contract of p create edges for proofs p depends on, i.e.
DependencyContract
A contract about the dependencies of an observer symbol, consisting of a precondition, a depends clause, and a measured-by clause.
DependencyContractCompletion
This class completes the instantiation for a dependency contract applications.
DependencyContractCompletion.TermStringWrapper
 
DependencyContractFeature
 
DependencyContractImpl
Standard implementation of the DependencyContract interface.
DependencyContractPO
The proof obligation for dependency contracts.
DependencyContractPOLoader
Loader for proof obligation arises from dependency contracts.
DependencyGraph
Represents a graph of dependencies between contracts/proofs, i.e.
DependencyGraph
The dependency graph tracks the flow of rule applications in the proof tree.
DependencyGraph.EdgeType
indicates the type of a contract application (if termination has to be considered or not)
DependencyGraph.SCC
Represents a strongly connected component of the graph.
DependencyGraphBuilder
A builder providing a static factory method for building dependency graphs.
DependencyNode
Represents a node in the graph of dependencies between proofs/contracts.
DependencyNodeData
Stores the dependency graph nodes touched by a proof step.
DependencyTracker
Tracks proof steps as they are applied on the proof.
DepthFirstGoalChooser
Helper class for managing a list of goals on which rules are applied.
DepthFirstGoalChooserBuilder
 
DescriptionFacade
This facade is used to load documentation for ProofScriptCommand and ProofScriptArgument.
DesignPattern
Design pattern.
DetachChange
A detachment change of a syntax tree.
diff_match_patch
Class containing the diff, match and patch methods.
diff_match_patch.Diff
Class representing one diff operation.
diff_match_patch.LinesToCharsResult
Internal class for returning results from diff_linesToChars().
diff_match_patch.Operation
The data structure representing a diff is a Linked list of Diff objects: {Diff(Operation.DELETE, "Hello"), Diff(Operation.INSERT, "Goodbye"), Diff(Operation.EQUAL, " world.")} which means: delete "Hello", add "Goodbye" and keep " world."
diff_match_patch.Patch
Class representing one patch operation.
DifferentFields
This variable condition checks if given two terms s, t both terms have a different unique symbol as top level operator
DifferentInstantiationCondition
 
DifferentReturnTypeOverwrite
Problem report indicating that a method has been overwritten with a different return type.
DiffFindAndIfFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the \assumes- and find-formula of a Taclet are matched to different members of the sequent.
DiffFindAndReplacewithFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the replacewith- and find-parts of a Taclet are matched to different terms.
Dimension
 
DirectedGraph<V,E extends GraphEdge>
Simple implementation of the Graph interface.
DirectlyBelowFeature
This feature returns zero if and only if the focus of the given rule application exists, is not top-level and the symbol immediately above the focus is badSymbol.
DirectlyBelowSymbolFeature
This feature returns zero if and only if the focus of the given rule application exists, is not top-level and the symbol immediately above the focus is badSymbol.
DirectoryFileCollection
This class is used to describe a directory structure as a repository for files to read in.
DirectoryProofBundleHandler
ProofBundleHandler for a directory that respects the bundle file hierarchy.
DisableGoal
Action enabling or disabling a selected set of goals.
DisjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the disjunction of predicates.
DisjunctivePredicateAbstractionLattice
A lattice for all predicates accepting the given sort.
DiskFileRepo
This class uses a temporary directory as a store for the proof-relevant files.
Divide
Divide.
Divide
Divide.
DivideAssignment
Divide assignment.
DivideAssignment
Divide assignment.
DivideLCRMonomials
Metaoperator for computing the result of dividing one monomial by another
DivideMonomials
Metaoperator for computing the result of dividing one monomial by another
DividePolynomialsProjection
 
DLEmbeddedExpression
 
DLEmbeddedExpression
This class is used to parse function applications with JavaDL escapes within set statements or similar situations.
DLSpecFactory
A factory for creating class invariants and operation contracts from DL specifications.
Do
Do.
Do
Do.
DoBreak
This class performs a labeled break.
DocComment
Contains tags with
DockingHelper
 
DockingLayout
Extension for working with layouts.
DoNothingCaret
A caret that does nothing.
DotExporter
Exports a DependencyGraph in DOT format.
DoubleHandler
 
DoubleLDT
 
DoubleLiteral
Double literal.
DoubleLiteral
Double literal.
DoWhileFinallyMacro
The abstract class DoWhileFinallyMacro can be used to create compound macros which apply the macro given by DoWhileFinallyMacro.getProofMacro() as long the given bound of steps is not reached yet, the condition given by DoWhileFinallyMacro.getCondition() holds, and the macro is applicable.
DragNDropInstantiator
The DragNDropInstantiator interpretes drag'n drop actions as taclet instantiations.
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter
This interface is impemented by filters selecting certain kinds of taclets depending on their syntactic structure
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithIfFindAndNoReplacewith
This filter selects all Taclet which have an assumes, find and no replacewith part.
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithIfFindAndReplacewith
This filter selects all Taclet which have an assumes, find and at least one replacewith part.
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithNoIf
This filter selects all Taclet which have no assume, but a find.
DragNDropInstantiator.TacletFilter.TacletWithNoIfFindAndAddrule
This filter selects all Taclet which have no assumes, but a find and at least one addrule section.
DropdownSelectionButton
A button consisting of an action component (normal button) and a selection component (dropdown button).
DropdownSelectionButton.EmptyAction
The empty action to be set if items is empty.
DropEffectlessElementariesCondition
 
DropEffectlessStoresCondition
 
DynamicCMenu
CMenu that gets (re-)generated when the action gets fired using the provided supplier.
DynamicCMenu.Action
Action that implements the dynamic behaviour and calls the supplier This class need not be instantiated manually, it is only public because it is contained in the generics of the surrounding class.
EchoCommand
A simple "echo" command for giving feedback to human observers during lengthy executions.
EchoCommand.Parameters
 
EditFormulaAction
Action to edit formulas in the actions mode
EditMostRecentFileAction
Opens the last opened file in an editor (well, it tries)
EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler
The method EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler.workWithFile(File) of the default instance EditMostRecentFileAction.EditFileActionHandler.getInstance() is used by EditMostRecentFileAction to edit the last opened file or to open the last used directory.
EditSourceFileAction
Used by IssueDialog to open the source file containing an error for editing.
ElementaryUpdate
Class of operators for elementary updates, i.e., updates of the form "x := t".
ElementValueArrayInitializer
 
ElementValuePair
 
ElementValuePairInfo
 
EliminableQuantifierTF
 
Else
Else.
Else
Else.
EmptyEnvInput
 
EmptyMapLiteral
 
EmptyMapLiteral
 
EmptySeqLiteral
 
EmptySeqLiteral
 
EmptySequent
Use this class in case no proof is loaded.
EmptySetLiteral
 
EmptySetLiteral
 
EmptyStatement
Empty statement.
EmptyStatement
Empty statement.
EngineState
 
EnhancedFor
The new enhanced form of a for-loop.
EnhancedFor
 
EnhancedFor2For
converts an enhanced for loop to an "old style" for loop.
EnhancedForElimination
This class defines a meta operator to resolve an enhanced for loop - by transformation to a "normal" loop.
EnhancedStringBuffer
StringBuffer with more functionality.
EnsureSourceConsistencyToggleAction
Toggles the flag to ensure consistency between source code and saved proof.

EnumClassBuilder
This transformation is made to transform any found EnumDeclaration into a corresponding EnumClassDeclaration.
EnumClassDeclaration
This class is used for wrapping an enum into a standard class type.
EnumClassDeclaration
This class is used to describe an enum type by its equivalent class declaration.
EnumConstant
 
EnumConstantCondition
ensures that the given instantiation for the schemavariable denotes a constant of an enum type.
EnumConstantDeclaration
 
EnumConstantReferenceInfo
This is a container class for references to enum constants, which may appear in bytecode annotations.
EnumConstantSpecification
 
EnumConstantValue
resolve a program variable to an integer literal.
EnumConstructorReference
 
EnumDeclaration
 
EnumTypeCondition
This variable condition checks if a type is an enum type.
EnvInput
Represents an entity read to produce an environment to read a proof obligation.
EnvNode
 
EqNonDuplicateAppFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff a certain Taclet app has not already been performed.
EqTermFeature
Term feature for testing equality of two terms.
Equality
This class defines the logic equality operator =.
Equality
This interface defines an equality relation between two objects.
EqualityConstraint
Deprecated.
EqualityUtils
 
Equals
Equals.
Equals
Equals.
EqualsHashCodeResetter<T>
Instances of this class are used to reset overwritten Object.equals(Object) and Object.hashCode() methods of the wrapped child element to the default Java implementation with referenced based equality.
EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
Interface to check two objects for equality based on their contents.
EqualsModProofIrrelevancyUtil
Utility methods for the EqualsModProofIrrelevancy interface.
EqualsModProofIrrelevancyWrapper<T extends EqualsModProofIrrelevancy>
Wrapper around an object that implements EqualsModProofIrrelevancy.
EqualsModProperty<T>
Interface to check for equality ignoring given properties and to compute according hash codes.
EqualUniqueCondition
 
Equivalence
Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is applicable and will not change the functional behavior of the program.
EquivalenceDirectedGraph
A directed graph, extended to store equivalence groups of vertices.
ErrorHandler
An error handler that receives exceptions from services, reports them to the user and may react upon them.
EscapeExpression
Handles JML expressions that begin with an escape character '\'.
EvaluateArgs
TODO
ExactInstanceof
Instanceof.
ExampleChooser
Dialog to choose an example to load.
ExampleChooser.Example
This class wraps a File and has a special ExampleChooser.Example.toString() method only using the short file name w/o path.
ExceptionalHandler
This is a handy class for tracing Exceptions that are otherwise lost in the thread chaos.
ExceptionBreakpoint
ThisExceptionBreakpoint represents an exception breakpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective breakpoint is hit.
ExceptionFailureEvent
 
ExceptionFailureNotification
 
ExceptionFailureNotificationDialog
 
ExceptionHandlerException
This Exception is only thrown by the ExceptionHandler
ExceptionTools
Various utility methods related to exceptions.
Exec
An exec statement.
Exec
Exec.
ExecCtxtSVWrapper
 
ExecutedSymbolicExecutionTreeNodesStopCondition
This StopCondition stops the auto mode (ApplyStrategy) if a given number (ExecutedSymbolicExecutionTreeNodesStopCondition.getMaximalNumberOfSetNodesToExecutePerGoal()) of maximal executed symbolic execution tree nodes is reached in a goal.
ExecutionAllArrayIndicesVariable
An implementation of IExecutionVariable used to query all array indices at the same time.
ExecutionAuxiliaryContract
The default implementation of IExecutionAuxiliaryContract.
ExecutionBranchCondition
The default implementation of IExecutionBranchCondition.
ExecutionBranchStatement
The default implementation of IExecutionBranchStatement.
ExecutionConstraint
The default implementation of IExecutionConstraint.

ExecutionContext
 
ExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn
The default implementation of IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn.
ExecutionJoin
The default implementation of IExecutionJoin.
ExecutionLink

ExecutionLoopCondition

ExecutionLoopInvariant
The default implementation of IExecutionLoopInvariant.
ExecutionLoopStatement
The default implementation of IExecutionLoopStatement.
ExecutionMethodCall
The default implementation of IExecutionMethodCall.
ExecutionMethodReturn
The default implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn.
ExecutionMethodReturnValue
The default implementation of IExecutionMethodReturnValue.
ExecutionNodePreorderIterator
Iterates preorder over the whole sub tree of a given IExecutionNode.
ExecutionNodeReader
Allows to read XML files which contains an symbolic execution tree written via an ExecutionNodeWriter.
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>
An implementation of IExecutionBaseMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>
An abstract implementation of IExecutionBlockStartNode which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
An abstract implementation of IExecutionElement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>
An abstract implementation of IExecutionNode which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract
An implementation of IExecutionAuxiliaryContract which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition
An implementation of IExecutionLoopCondition which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchStatement
An implementation of IExecutionBranchStatement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessConstraint
An implementation of IExecutionConstraint which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessExceptionalMethodReturn
An implementation of IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessJoin
An implementation of IExecutionJoin which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYLessLink
An implementation of IExecutionLink which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopCondition
An implementation of IExecutionLoopCondition which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopInvariant
An implementation of IExecutionLoopInvariant which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopStatement
An implementation of IExecutionLoopStatement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodCall
An implementation of IExecutionMethodCall which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturn
An implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessMethodReturnValue
An implementation of IExecutionMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessOperationContract
An implementation of IExecutionOperationContract which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStart
An implementation of IExecutionStart which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessStatement
An implementation of IExecutionStatement which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination
An implementation of IExecutionTermination which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessValue
An implementation of IExecutionValue which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable
An implementation of IExecutionVariable which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
ExecutionNodeSymbolicLayoutExtractor
Special SymbolicLayoutExtractor for IExecutionNodes.
ExecutionNodeWriter
Allows to persistent selected properties of IExecutionNodes as XML file.
ExecutionOperationContract
The default implementation of IExecutionOperationContract.
ExecutionStart
The default implementation of IExecutionStart.
ExecutionStatement
The default implementation of IExecutionStatement.
ExecutionTermination
The default implementation of IExecutionTermination.
ExecutionTime
Simple class to measure the running time of various 'activities'.
ExecutionValue
The default implementation of IExecutionValue.
ExecutionVariable
The default implementation of IExecutionVariable.
ExecutionVariableExtractor
Extracts the current state and represents it as IExecutionVariables.
ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionValue
The IExecutionValue instantiated by the ExecutionVariableExtractor.
ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable
The IExecutionVariable instantiated by the ExecutionVariableExtractor.
ExhaustiveProofMacro
The abstract class ExhaustiveProofMacro can be used to create compound macros which either apply the macro given by ExhaustiveProofMacro.getProofMacro() directly, or --if not directly applicable-- search on the sequent for any applicable posInOcc and apply it on the first applicable one or --if not applicable anywhere on the sequent-- do not apply it.
ExistentiallyConnectedFormulasFeature
Binary feature that return zero if two given projection term is CS-Releated.
ExitCommand
 
ExitKeYEvent
An exit key event indicating that KeY is currently shut down.
ExitKeYNotification
This task takes care for a notification when exiting KeY.
ExitMainAction
 
ExpandMethodBody
Replaces the MethodBodyStatement shortcut with the full body, performs prefix adjustments in the body (execution context).
ExpandQueriesMetaConstruct
Uses the class QueryExpand in order to insert query expansions in the term that the meta construct is applied on.
ExplorationAction
Common functionalities for proof exploration actions.
ExplorationExtension
Entry point for the Proof Exploration Extension.
ExplorationModeModel
The central place to store global information for Proof Exploration.
ExplorationModeModel.ExplorationState
State whether whole application (with shown second branch) or simplified with hidden branch app should be used
ExplorationNodeData
Information on exploration that is attached to nodes.
ExplorationStepsList
A view that summaries the exploration steps inside a proof.
Expression
Expression taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
Expression
General expression.
ExpressionBuilder
This visitor creates expression from KeyAst.Term.
ExpressionContainer
Expression container.
ExpressionContainer
Expression container.
ExpressionJumpStatement
Expression jump statement.
ExpressionJumpStatement
Expression jump statement.
ExpressionKit
 
ExpressionStatement
An ExpressionStatement is a statement that may appear as an expression.
ExpressionStatement
An ExpressionStatement is a statement that may appear as an expression.
ExpressionSVWrapper
 
ExtendedIdentifier
an extended identifier that accepts hash symbols in its name but not as first character
Extends
Extends.
Extends
Extends.
Extension<T>
 
ExtensionManager
Settings panel where extensions are disabled / enabled.
ExtensionSettings
 
ExternalProcessLauncher
This class is responsible for starting external processes: It creates the process (stderr is merged to stdout). Creates the pipe that is used for communication. Starts the process and returns. Remark: Does not block the invoking thread.
ExtList
Extends java.util.LinkedList in order to collect elements according to their type.
Factory
 
FactoryMethod
Not done yet: Should use semantical entities instead of syntactical ~Declarations.
False
The False element of the boolean lattice, representing exactly the boolean false.
Feature
A Feature is a class that is able to compute the cost of a RuleApp.
FeatureSettings
Feature flags for the selected and deselected of experimental features.
FeatureSettings.Feature
 
FeatureSettingsPanel
 
Field
A program model element representing fields.
Field
A program model element representing fields.
FieldConstantHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of field constants.
FieldDeclaration
Field declaration.
FieldDeclaration
Field declaration.
FieldInfo
 
FieldReference
 
FieldReference
Field reference.
FieldReplaceVisitor
Replaces field references o.a by methodcalls o._a().
FieldSpecification
 
FieldSpecification
 
FieldTypeToSortCondition
Variable condition that enforces a given generic sort to be instantiated with the type of a field constant.
FieldWatchpoint
ThisFieldWatchpoint represents a Java watchpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective variable is accessed or modified.
FIFOStrategy
Trivial implementation of the Strategy interface that uses only the goal time to determine the cost of a RuleApp.
FIFOStrategy.Factory
 
FileCollection
This class encapsulates a collection of files which is arbitrarily organised.
FileCollection.Walker
A Walker allows to iterate (once and one way) through a FileCollection.
FileCollector
Convenience class to collect all files of a directory tree, recursively.
Filenames
 
FileRepo
This interface provides access to files.
FileRuleSource
 
FilesChecker
This class tests if all given proof is consistent w.r.t.
FilesChecker.CheckedFunction<T,R>
 
FileUtils
 
FilterStrategy
 
Final
Final.
Final
Final.
Finally
Finally.
Finally
Finally.
FinalOverwrite
Problem report indicating that a member has been overwritten that was declared final, or was in a final type.
FinalReferenceCondition
ensures that the given instantiation for the schema variable denotes a final field
FindDepthFeature
A feature that computes the depth of the find-position of a taclet (top-level positions have depth zero or if not a find taclet)
FindPrefixRestrictionFeature
Feature for investigating whether some restrictions to the prefix of the find formula apply.
FindPrefixRestrictionFeature.PositionModifier
 
FindPrefixRestrictionFeature.PrefixChecker
 
FindProblemInformation
The visitor for extracting the ProblemInformation.
FindResources
 
FindRightishFeature
Walking from the root of a formula down to the focus of a rule application, count how often we choose the left branch (subterm) and how the right branches.
FindTaclet
An abstract class to represent Taclets with a find part.
FindTacletAppContainer
Instances of this class are immutable
FindTacletBuilder<T extends FindTaclet>
Superclass of TacletBuilder objects that have a non-empty find clause.
FindTacletExecutor<TacletKind extends FindTaclet>
 
FinishAuxiliaryBlockComputationMacro
 
FinishAuxiliaryComputationMacro
 
FinishAuxiliaryLoopComputationMacro
 
FinishAuxiliaryMethodComputationMacro
 
FinishSymbolicExecutionMacro
The macro FinishSymbolicExecutionMacro continues automatic rule application until there is no more modality on the sequent.
FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilMergePointMacro
The macro FinishSymbolicExecutionUntilJionPointMacro continues automatic rule application until a merge point is reached (i.e.
Flag
Currently not implemented in ArgumentsLifter
FloatHandler
 
FloatHandler
 
FloatHandler.SqrtMode
 
FloatingPointLDT
 
FloatLDT
 
FloatLiteral
Float literal.
FloatLiteral
Float literal.
FloatRemainderHandler
This handler is a fallback handler that introduces a new uninterpreted function symbol with prefix "uf_" for all FP expressions.
FocusCommand
The command "focus" allows you to select formulas from the current sequent to focus verification on.
FocusFormulaProjection
 
FocusInAntecFeature
 
FocusIsSubFormulaOfInfFlowContractAppFeature
Checks whether the focus of the ruleApp is contained in one of the formulas added by information flow contract applications.
FocusProjection
Projection of a rule application to its focus (the term or formula that the rule operates on, that for taclets is described using \find, and that can be modified by the rule).
FocussedAutoModeUserAction
User action for "Apply rules automatically here" (i.e.
FocussedBreakpointRuleApplicationManager
A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal).
FocussedRuleApplicationManager
A rule app manager that ensures that rules are only applied to a certain subterm within the proof (within a goal).
FontAwesomeBrands
 
FontAwesomeRegular
 
FontAwesomeSolid
 
FontSizeFacade
 
For
For.
For
For.
ForEachCP
Feature representing a ChoicePoint that iterates over the terms returned by a TermGenerator.
ForestWalker
Walks all syntax trees from a list of compilation units in depth-first order.
ForInitUnfoldTransformer
Pulls the initializor out of a for-loop.
Format
Create textual descriptions of program elements, program model elements or lists thereof.
Formats
Default formatting strings that are useful for error reporting.
FormulaAddedByRuleFeature
Binary feature that returns zero iff the find-formula of the concerned rule app was introduced by a certain kind rule of rule (described via a RuleFilter)
FormulaChangeInfo
This class is used to hold information about modified formulas.
FormulaSV
A schema variable that is used as placeholder for formulas.
FormulaTag
Class whose instances represent tags to identify the formulas of sequents persistently, i.e.
FormulaTagManager
Class to manage the tags of the formulas of a sequent (node).
FormulaTermLabel
Label attached to a predicates for instance in postconditions, loop invariants or precondition checks of applied operation contracts.
FormulaTermLabelFactory
A factory for creating FormulaTermLabel objects.
FormulaTermLabelMerger
The TermLabelMerger used to merge FormulaTermLabels.
FormulaTermLabelRefactoring
The TermLabelRefactoring used to label predicates with a FormulaTermLabel on applied loop invariants or operation contracts.
FormulaTermLabelUpdate
The TermLabelUpdate used to label predicates with a FormulaTermLabel of add clauses which were not labeled before.
ForToWhile
converts a for-loop to a while loop.
ForToWhileTransformation
This transformation is used to transform a for-loop into a while-loop.
ForUpdates
This class encapsulates updates of a for loop
FreeLabelFinder
descends recursively a given program and looks for free occurrences of a specified label
FreeLabelInVariableCondition
 
FreeLDT
Generic data type, which has no predefined theory.
FreeLiteral
 
FullAutoPilotProofMacro
This class captures a proof macro which is meant to fully automise KeY proof workflow.
FullInformationFlowAutoPilotMacro
 
FullPropositionalExpansionMacro
The macro FullPropositionalExpansionMacro apply rules to decompose propositional toplevel formulas; it even splits the goal if necessary.
FullUseInformationFlowContractMacro
 
Function
Objects of this class represent function and predicate symbols.
FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for an AuxiliaryContract.
FunctionalBlockContract
This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for a block (see FunctionalBlockContractPO.
FunctionalBlockContractPO
A proof obligation for a FunctionalBlockContract.
FunctionalBlockContractPOLoader
Loader for proof obligation arises from functional block contracts.
FunctionalLoopContract
This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for a block that starts with a loop (see FunctionalLoopContractPO.
FunctionalLoopContractPO
A proof obligation for a FunctionalLoopContract.
FunctionalLoopContractPOLoader
Loader for proof obligation arises from functional loop contracts.
FunctionalOperationContract
A contract about an operation (i.e., a method or a constructor), consisting of a precondition, a postcondition, a modifiable clause, a measured-by clause, and a modality.
FunctionalOperationContractCompletion
This class completes the instantiation for a functional operation contract applications.
FunctionalOperationContractImpl
Standard implementation of the OperationContract interface.
FunctionalOperationContractPO
The proof obligation for operation contracts.
FunctionOperationContractPOLoader
Loader for proof obligation arises by function operation contract.
FunctionPredicateBuilder
This visitor evaluates all secondary (level 1) declarations.
GeneralFailureEvent
Deprecated.
use IssueDialog
GeneralFailureJTextPaneDisplay
Displays a string in a JOptionPane error message window.
GeneralFailureNotification
This task notifies the user about an unexpected error.
GeneralInformationEvent
If the system wants to inform the user it may emit this event.
GeneralInformationJTextPaneDisplay
Displays a string in a JOptionPane information message window.
GeneralInformationNotification
This notification task is used to inform the user about a non-error situation (e.g.
GeneralSettings
 
GenericRemover
 
GenericRemoverMonitor
 
GenericRemovingLemmaGenerator
Generic removing lemma generator adds the default implementation only that all GenericSorts are replaced to equally named ProxySorts.
GenericResolutionTransformation
This is the base class to all transformations used in the generics removal process.
GenericSort
Sort used for generic taclets Within an SVInstantiations-object a generic sort is instantiated by a concrete sort, which has to be a subsort of the instantiations of the supersorts of this sort
GenericSortCondition
Abstract superclass for conditions controlling the instantiations of generic sorts
GenericSortException
This exception thrown if there is no appropriate instantiation of the generic sorts occurring within an "SVInstantiations"-object
GenericSortInstantiations
This class handles the instantiation of generic sorts (used for generic taclets), i.e.
GenericSupersortException
this exception is thrown if a generic sort has been declared with an illegal supersort
GenericTermReplacer
A generic Term replace visitor based on a filter predicate and a replacement function for the filtered subterms.
GenericWorker<T>
Generic background thread worker.
Geq
The Geq element of the sign lattice, representing all positive integers and zero.
Ghost
The JML modifier "ghost".
Ghost
 
Goal
A proof is represented as a tree of nodes containing sequents.
GoalBackAction
This action is one part of the previous UndoLastStepAction: It undoes the last rule application on the currently selected branch.
GoalChooser
Interface to be implemented by classes in order to customize the goal selection strategy of the automatic prover environment.
GoalChooserBuilder
interface to be implemented by builders returning a goal chooser
GoalList
 
GoalListener
interface to be implemented by a goal listener
GoalSelectAboveAction
Action to select the next goal above in the proof tree.
GoalSelectBelowAction
Action to select the next goal below in the proof tree.
GotoReferenceAction
Action to go the referenced proof.
Graph<V,E>
A graph object G(V,E) contains a set V of vertices and a set E of edges.
GraphEdge
Graph edge for use in a Graph.
GraphNode
A graph node used in the DependencyGraph.
GraphvizDotExecutor
Provides facilities to launch graphviz, forward the graph input data and parse the resulting image.
GraphvizResult
Result of running an external graph renderer.
GreaterOrEquals
Greater or equals.
GreaterOrEquals
Greater or equals.
GreaterThan
Greater than.
GreaterThan
Greater than.
Guard
This class encapsulates a guard for a loop
GUIAbstractTreeNode
 
GUIListener
GUIListener defines the interface for an object that listens to actions of gui components, e.g.
GUIOneStepChildTreeNode
A special kind of gui proof tree node to show intermediate steps of the OneStepSimplifier.
GUIProofTreeModel
An implementation of TreeModel that can be displayed using the JTree class framework and reflects the state of a Proof object.
GuiUtilities
 
GZipFileRuleSource
This file rule source derivative wraps its input stream into a GZIPInputStream thus allowing decompressing gnu-zipped proof files.
GZipProofSaver
This proof saver derivative wraps its generated output stream into a GZIPOutputStream thus compressing proof files.
HandleArith
This class is used to prove some simple arithmetic problem which are a==b, a>=b, a<=b; Besides it can be used to prove that a>=b or a<=b by knowing that c>=d or c<=d;
HandlerUtil
A collection of static methods that SMTHandlers are likely to use.
HashCode
This interface defines a function mapping objects to integer values.
HasLocation
This interface simply states, that an exception has locational information.
HasLoopInvariantCondition
Checks whether a loop has an invariant (either normal or "free").
HasOrigin
Classes with this interface provides a simple human-readable String where they came from.
Heap
Represents a heap in the SMT model.
HeapContext
Heap contexts are various scenarios of what happens to heap variables during PO generation and built-in rule applications, like saving atPre heaps, anonymisation, etc.
HeapGenerator
The heap generator returns an iterator over all terms of sort heap that can be found in the sequent are top level in the sense that they are not part of a larger term expression depending on the mode: heaps just occurring in updates are included or ignored
HeapLDT
LDT responsible for the "Heap" sort, and the associated "Field" sort.
HeapLDT.SplitFieldName
Wrapper class
HeapSimplificationMacro
This macro performs simplification of Heap and LocSet terms.
HeapStatusExt
 
HeatmapExt
Extension adapter for Heatmap
HeatmapOptionsDialog
This Dialog contains options for highlighting sequent formulae or terms according to their age, i.e., when they were first introduced into the proof.
HeatmapSettingsAction
Action for invoking the heatmap options dialog.
HeatmapToggleAction
 
HelperClassForTests
 
HelperClassForUtilityTests
 
HelpFacade
A gate to the KeY documentation system.
HelpInfo
Annotate the help page for your component.
HeuristicInstantiation
 
HideCommand
Proof script command to hide a formula from the sequent.
HideCommand.Parameters
 
HidePackagePrefixToggleAction
 
HideSequentPrintFilter
This filter takes a search string and yields a sequent containing only sequent formulas that match the search.
HtmlDialog
Dialog that displays an HTML document.
HtmlFactory
Utility class to generate HTML tables for UI purposes.
HTMLReport
Provides a static method to print the check results in HTML format to a given path.
HTMLSyntaxHighlighter
Performs a simple pattern-based syntax highlighting for KeY sequents by adding styled HTML tags.
HTMLSyntaxHighlighter.Args
Set of args to the highlighter that produce the same output
IBean
Defines the methods that a Java bean must have.
IBreakpoint
Defines the basic functionality of a breakpoint.
IBreakpointStopCondition
Defines the basic functionality of an StopCondition which stops applying rules when at least one IBreakpoint is hit.
IBuiltInRuleApp
 
IClassLoader
Instances of this class allow to access Classes at runtime in a special application type.
IconFactory
 
IconFont
 
IconFontProvider
 
IconFontSwing
 
IconProvider
 
Icons
Icons of the Exploration Extension
IdDeclaration
 
IDefaultStrategyPropertiesFactory
Instances of this factory are used to create default StrategyProperties used by a Strategy defined via its StrategySettingsDefinition.
Identifier
Identifier.
Identity
Problem report indicating that the planned transformation is redundant.
IdentityHashSet<T extends @Nullable Object>
Hash set using the object's identity instead of their hashcode to determine uniqueness.
IdentityIndex
 
IdentitySequentPrintFilter
Identity Filter not doing anything
IdentitySequentPrintFilter.IdentityFilterEntry
A filter entry, representing one sequent formula.
IExecutionAuxiliaryContract
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a use block/loop contract application.
IExecutionBaseMethodReturn<S extends SourceElement>
Defines the common interface of IExecutionMethodReturn and IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn.
IExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>
An extended IExecutionNode which groups several child nodes.
IExecutionBranchCondition
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a branch condition, e.g.
IExecutionBranchStatement
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a node which creates multiple child branches defined by branch conditions (IExecutionBranchCondition), e.g.
IExecutionConstraint
A constrained considered during symbolic execution.
IExecutionContext
extracted interface to allow schema variabes to stand for an execution context
IExecutionElement
Defines the basic methods and properties each element in the symbolic execution tree model has.
IExecutionExceptionalMethodReturn
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a exceptional method return.
IExecutionJoin
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a join.
IExecutionLink
A link between two IExecutionNodes.
IExecutionLoopCondition
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop condition, e.g.
IExecutionLoopInvariant
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop invariant application.
IExecutionLoopStatement
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop.
IExecutionMethodCall
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a method call, e.g.
IExecutionMethodReturn
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a method return, e.g.
IExecutionMethodReturnValue
A return value of an IExecutionMethodReturn.
IExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>
Provides the basic methods each node in a symbolic execution tree should have and allows to access the children.
IExecutionOperationContract
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a use operation contract application.
IExecutionStart
The start node of a symbolic execution tree.
IExecutionStatement
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a single statement, e.g.
IExecutionTermination
A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents the normal termination of a branch, e.g.
IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind
Defines the possible termination kinds.
IExecutionValue
A value of an IExecutionVariable, e.g.
IExecutionVariable
A variable value pair contained in an IExecutionNode, e.g.
If
If.
If
If.
IfExThenElse
This singleton class implements a conditional operator "\ifEx iv; (phi) \then (t1) \else (t2)", where iv is an integer logic variable, phi is a formula, and where t1 and t2 are terms with the same sort.
IfFormulaInstantiation
This interface represents objects representing an instantiation of one formula of the if-sequence of a taclet.
IfFormulaInstantiationCache
 
IfFormulaInstDirect
Instantiation of an if-formula that has to be proven by an explicit if-goal
IfFormulaInstSeq
Instantiation of an if-formula that is a formula of an existing sequent.
IFilter<T>
Utility class to select elements.
IFilterWithException<T extends @Nullable Object,E extends Throwable>
Utility class to select elements which also allows that exceptions are thrown during selection phase.
IfInstantiationCachePool
Direct-mapped cache of lists of formulas (potential instantiations of if-formulas of taclets) that were modified after a certain point of time
IfInstantiationCachePool.IfInstantiationCache
 
IfInstantiator
This class implements custom instantiation of if-formulas.
IfMatchResult
 
IfMismatchException
this exception thrown if an if-sequent match failed
IForUpdates
 
IFProofObligationVars
This class contains the set of four sets of ProofObligationVars necessary for information flow proofs.
IfThenElse
This singleton class implements a general conditional operator \if (phi) \then (t1) \else (t2).
IfThenElseMalusFeature
Feature that counts the IfThenElse operators above the focus of a rule application.
IGuard
 
IHTacletFilter
Filter that selects taclets using the method admissible of the Taclet class, i.e.
IllegalChangeReportException
Exception thrown by the change history in case of illegal change reports.
IllegalFormulaException
 
IllegalInstantiationException
this exception is thrown if an invalid instantiation for a schema variable was given
IllegalInterfaceMember
Problem report indicating that a member declaration is not a valid member of an interface.
IllegalModifierException
 
IllegalName
Problem report indicating that a chosen name is illegal, for instance a keyword.
IllegalNumberException
 
IllegalOptionValueException
 
IllegalRegexException
This exception is thrown when a String is expected be a valid regular expression, but is not.
IllegalResultException
 
IllegalTacletException
 
IllegalTransformationException
An exception indicating that a transformation performed on the abstract syntax tree leaves the internal datastructures in an inconsistent state.
ILoopInit
 
ImmutableArray<S extends @Nullable Object>
 
ImmutableFixedLengthBitSet
Represents a non-negative number with access to single bits; the length of the bit set is fixed.
ImmutableHeap<T extends Comparable<T>>
Interface for heaps of objects of class T.
ImmutableLeftistHeap<T extends Comparable<T>>
This class implements the leftist heap, see "Functional Data Structures" by Chris Okasaki
ImmutableList<T extends @Nullable Object>
List interface to be implemented by non-destructive lists
ImmutableMap<S extends @NonNull Object,T extends @Nullable Object>
An immutable data structure mapping keys to values.
ImmutableMapEntry<S,T extends @Nullable Object>
This interface declares a tupel of two values.
Immutables
This class is a collection of methods that operate on immutable collections, in particular ImmutableSets and ImmutableLists.
ImmutableSet<T extends @Nullable Object>
interface implemented by non-destructive Sets.
ImmutableSLList<T extends @Nullable Object>
Simple implementation of a non-destructive (unmodifiable) list.
IModelSettings
Provides the settings used to construct a symbolic object model.

ImplicitElementInfo

ImplicitIdentifier
subclasses the recoder Identifier in order to allow fields with special characters.
Import

Import

IncludeFinder
This visitor finds all includes in the given ASTs.
Includes
Encapsulates 2 lists (one for LDT-include, one for "normal" includes) containing the filenames parsed in the include-section of a KeYFile.
InconsistentPatternException
 
IncreaseFontSizeAction
 
Index
Implements an object-to-index assignment.
IndexFactory
Simple counter to produce a sequence of numbers.
InEquationMultFeature
Feature that decides whether the multiplication of two inequations (using rules of set inEqSimp_nonLin_multiply) is allowed.
InfFlowBlockContractTacletBuilder
Implements the rule which inserts operation contracts for a method call.
InfFlowCheckInfo
 
InfFlowCompositePO
 
InfFlowContractAppFeature
 
InfFlowContractAppTaclet
A normal RewriteTaclet except that the formula which is added by this taclet is also added to the list of formulas contained in the INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY.

InfFlowContractPOLoader

InfFlowMethodContractTacletBuilder

InfFlowSpec
 
InfoDialog
 
InformationFlowContract
A contract about the dependencies of an observer symbol, consisting of a precondition, a depends clause, and a measured-by clause.
InformationFlowContractImpl
Standard implementation of the DependencyContract interface.
InformationWindow
The information window is used to present detailed information about the execution of a solver.
InformationWindow.Information
 
InfoTree
This class is used by InfoView to display its contents.
InfoTreeModel
Extension of DefaultTreeModel used by InfoTree.
InfoTreeNode
Every node of InfoTree is an instance of this class.
InfoView
Class for info contents displayed in MainWindow.
InfoViewContentPane
This class is used to display descriptions in InfoView.
InheritanceSpecification
Inheritance specification.
InheritanceSpecification
Inheritance specification.
InitArray
Split an array creation expression with explicit array initializer, creating a creation expression with dimension expression and a list of assignments (-> Java language specification, 15.10)
InitArrayCreation
Split an array creation expression with explicit array initializer, creating a creation expression with dimension expression and a list of assignments (-> Java language specification, 15.10) This meta construct delivers the creation expression
InitConfig
an instance of this class describes the initial configuration of the prover.
InitiallyClause
 
InitiallyClauseImpl
Standard implementation of the InitiallyClause interface.
InitialPositionTable
An InitialPositionTable is a PositionTable that describes the beginning of the element/subelement relationship.
Inject
Marker annotations for setters or constructors to inject implementations.
InjectionException
 
InjectionException
 
InjectionReflectionException
 
InnerBreakAndContinueReplacer
This replaces all breaks and continues in a loop with break l, where l is a specified label.
InnerNodeView
Sequent view for an inner node.
InnerNodeViewListener
Listener for an InnerNodeView Reacts on mouse events to highlight the selected part of the sequent and it pops up a menu showing all applicable actions at the highlighted position.
InnerNodeViewMenu
The menu shown by a InnerNodeViewListener when the user clicks on an InnerNodeView.
InnerVariableNamer
Implements "inner renaming", i.e.
InsertHiddenTacletMenuItem
This item groups all insert hidden taclets and offers a more convienient user interface to add them.
InsertionTacletBrowserMenuItem
 
InsertSystemInvariantTacletMenuItem
This menu item groups all taclets which allow to insert class invariants

InspectorForFormulas
Inspects whether a given string can be translated into a formula.

Instanceof
Instanceof.
InstanceOfHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of instanceof and exactinstanceof functions.

InstantiatedSVFeature
Feature that returns zero iff a certain schema variable is instantiated.
InstantiationCost

InstantiationCostScalerFeature
 
InstantiationEntry<E>
This is an abstract class that encapsulates an instantiation of a SchemaVariable.
InstantiationFileHandler
 
InstantiationProposer
Provides proposals for schema variable instantiations.
InstantiationProposerCollection
Composite of instantiation proposers.
InStrictFp
This variable condition checks if a context is affected by the strictfp modifier
Instruction<OP extends Operator>
Class encoding the instructions of the matching vm
IntegerHandler
 
IntegerLDT
This class inherits from LDT and implements all method that are necessary to handle integers, shorts and bytes.
IntegerOpHandler
This SMT translation handler takes care of integer expressions.
IntegerSimplificationMacro
This macro performs simplification of integers and terms with integers.

InteractionListener
 
InteractionListener.SettingType
 
Interactive
CIs should never execute these tests, because they require manual interaction.
InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
Instances of class implementing this interface are able to complete rule applications.
InterfaceDeclaration
Interface declaration.
InterfaceDeclaration
Interface declaration.
IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser
Parses a KeY proof file into an intermediate representation.
IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.Result
Simple structure comprising the results of the parser.
IntermediateProofReplayer
This class is responsible for generating a KeY proof from an intermediate representation generated by IntermediatePresentationProofFileParser.
IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException
Signals an error during construction of a built-in rule app.
IntermediateProofReplayer.Result
Simple structure containing the results of the replay procedure.
IntermediateProofReplayer.TacletAppConstructionException
Signals an error during construction of a taclet app.
InterruptListener
Event listener for interruptions.
Intersect
 
Intersect
 
IntersectionType
Represents an intersection type, which was introduced in java 5.

implemented by iterators of primitive type int
IntLiteral

IntLiteral
Int literal.
IntroAtPreDefsOp
Transformer that introduces concrete prestate variables
